name: python3-sigma
title: python3-sigma
summary: library that parses and converts Sigma rules into queries (Python 3)
description:
library that parses and converts Sigma rules into queries (Python 3)
This package contains a Python library that parses and converts Sigma rules
into queries. It is a replacement for the legacy Sigma toolchain (sigmac) with
a much cleaner design and is almost fully tested.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sigma because library that parses and converts Sigma rules into queries (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sigma as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sigma with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sigma --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
